purpose: Fixed train, development, and sealed-test windows for model-governance decisions.

periods.name: train
periods.allowed_use: Fit exploratory thresholds, estimate broad historical base rates, and debug feature construction.

periods.name: development
periods.allowed_use: Compare predeclared candidate variants and choose exactly one frozen challenger before sealed evaluation.

periods.name: sealed_test
periods.allowed_use: Evaluate frozen candidates only after outcomes mature; do not tune thresholds, buckets, or provider rules on this period.

rules: Do not move period boundaries after inspecting outcomes.
Do not use sealed_test outcomes to choose thresholds, buckets, providers, or labels.
Any model changed after 2026-06-30 must be evaluated on a later sealed window.
Promotion requires a frozen candidate manifest before sealed outcomes are inspected.
